title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
